books.title: Dune
books.author: Frank Herbert
books.synopsis: Set on the desert planet Arrakis, Dune is the story of the boy Paul Atreides, heir to a noble family tasked with ruling an inhospitable world where the only thing of value is the 'spice' melange.
books.why_it_fits: Our AI is temporarily offline, but this classic provides an epic, world-building escape perfect for any mood.

books.title: Pride and Prejudice
books.author: Jane Austen
books.synopsis: The story follows the turbulent relationship between Elizabeth Bennet, the daughter of a country gentleman, and Fitzwilliam Darcy, a rich aristocratic landowner.
books.why_it_fits: A timeless fallback choice that offers comfort, wit, and a steady, character-driven narrative while the AI rests.

books.title: The Hobbit
books.author: J.R.R. Tolkien
books.synopsis: Bilbo Baggins is whisked away from his comfortable life in Hobbiton by the wizard Gandalf and a company of dwarves to win a share of a dragon's treasure.
books.why_it_fits: When technology fails, it's the perfect time to go on a nostalgic, adventurous journey in Middle-earth.
